title: Shopify Store Speed & Mobile Optimization
challenge: The store had unoptimized product images and a theme with too many third-party scripts. Mobile performance was poor, causing high bounce rates on phones. The owner had no data on where customers were dropping off.
solution: Compressed and converted all product images to WebP format
Removed unused Shopify apps and scripts (reduced JS load by ~40%)
Implemented lazy loading for below-the-fold images
Fixed mobile menu and touch interactions
Set up Google Analytics 4 with basic conversion tracking
takeaway: Image optimization alone had the biggest impact — something often overlooked. I learned that starting with performance auditing before touching any design gives you the clearest priorities. Next time I'd also add heatmap tracking from day one.

title: GA4 Analytics Setup for Online Boutique
challenge: The store owner was running Facebook ads but had no idea which products or campaigns were actually driving sales. The old Universal Analytics had expired, and nothing was being tracked.
solution: Installed and configured GA4 with Shopify integration
Set up purchase, add-to-cart, and checkout events via GTM
Created a basic Looker Studio dashboard for weekly review
Walked the owner through reading the data themselves
Identified top 2 products contributing 65% of revenue

annualImpact.label: Owner Decision
annualImpact.value: Reallocated ad budget to top 2 products

takeaway: The biggest win wasn't the data itself — it was helping the client understand it. I learned to always include a training session so the client can be self-sufficient. I'd add monthly check-in calls next time to make the insights actionable on a regular cadence.

title: Portfolio Website — AI Review Generator
challenge: I needed a portfolio project that demonstrated real-world React skills and API integration. I wanted to build something genuinely useful — a tool that generates product review copy using an AI API, with a clean UI and bulk processing support.
solution: Built a full React + Vite app from scratch
Integrated OpenAI API for review text generation
Added bulk URL input with queue-based processing
Implemented copy-to-clipboard, stop/retry, and per-product controls
Deployed live on Netlify with CI/CD from GitHub
takeaway: Building this project end-to-end was one of my biggest learning boosts. I discovered how much I learn by shipping something real versus following tutorials. I'd add proper error boundaries and loading skeletons earlier in the process next time — they make a huge UX difference.
